title: Lucky Blocks
description: Have even more fun in Minecraft with crazy Lucky Blocks of various Minerals
body:
![Title](https://i.postimg.cc/JhS5XQvG/title.png)

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/tFmJ75xp86) [![patreon-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_64h.png)](https://www.patreon.com/cw/canvasofsouls) [![github-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/github-plural_64h.png)](https://github.com/Coconite/Coconite-Datapacks)

# This datapack needs the REQUIRED Resourcepack:

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lucky-blocks-resourcepack

# 📖 Description

This datapack adds 7 Lucky Blocks that can trigger insane events when breaking them.

![lucky blocks](https://i.postimg.cc/JhrLLrtn/luckyblocks.png)

There are two ways to obtain the Lucky Blocks:

## 🛠️ Crafting

Use a crafting table, dirt and a mineral to craft a Lucky Block in survival.

![Recipes](https://i.postimg.cc/pd12xsrZ/animation.gif)

## ⌨️ Operator Tab

Otherwise, you can get a stack of Lucky Blocks using the button in the menu (You need OP for this)

![Pause](https://i.postimg.cc/3wNprb8F/pause-menu.png)

![Lucky Blocks Menu](https://i.postimg.cc/TwQZj1MG/lucky-blocks-menu.png)

## Configuration

Sometimes, can be annoying when a trap is set and you cant delete or modify it.
But in this datapack/mod, you can!

Use the command

```
/trigger c.lb.trigger
```

To show the In-Chat UI.

![chat config](https://i.postimg.cc/1RWHrDHN/image.png)

Clicking the first option, the Traps Config will show up and you can enable or disable any trap.

![trapss](https://i.postimg.cc/Kv6t0fgP/image.png)
